com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Class ClusterInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.ClusterInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IClusterInfo

    public final class ClusterInfo
extends Object
implements IClusterInfo
    1C:Enterprise platform 8 server cluster description

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Gets a cluster ID

      Gets allowed deviation for the number of server errors per query per minute based on the average value for all processes.

      Gets an expiration timeout

      Gets the name or IP address of the computer where the cluster register and the master cluster manager process are located

      Gets the lifetime limit of cluster working processes

      Gets load balancing mode.

      Gets the main IP port number of the cluster manager

      Gets the limit (in KB) of virtual address space per working process

      Gets the maximum allowed period (in seconds) of exceeding the memory size limit

      Gets a cluster name

      Gets connection security level
      int getSessionFaultToleranceLevel()
      Gets session fault tolerance level

      Returns whether dump should be created for processes exceeded memory limit during termination

      Returns whether processes with errors should be force terminated.
      void setClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold(int errorsCountThreshold)
      Sets allowed deviation for the number of server errors per query per minute based on the average value for all processes.

      Enforces creation of memory dump of processes, which are killed for exceeding memory limit.

      Enforces termination of processes with errors.

      • getLoadBalancingMode

        public int getLoadBalancingMode()
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Gets load balancing mode.
        • 0 - priorities are determined by available performance
        • 1 - priorities are determined by available memory
        Default value: 0
        Specified by:
        getLoadBalancingMode in interface IClusterInfo
        Returns:
        load balancing mode

      • setLoadBalancingMode

        public void setLoadBalancingMode(int mode)
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Sets load balancing mode. For details, see IClusterInfo.getLoadBalancingMode()
        Specified by:
        setLoadBalancingMode in interface IClusterInfo
        Parameters:
        mode - load balancing mode

      • getClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold

        public int getClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold()
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Gets allowed deviation for the number of server errors per query per minute based on the average value for all processes.
        Specified by:
        getClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold in interface IClusterInfo
        Returns:
        allowed amount of server error per one query per minute.

      • setClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold

        public void setClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold(int errorsCountThreshold)
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Sets allowed deviation for the number of server errors per query per minute based on the average value for all processes.

        Is set up as a percentage of the average value of the rest processes. For example if the parameter value is set up at "50", and the average amount of errors per one query per minute during the last 5 minutes is "100", then a threshold is considered as exceeded for the processes which called more than 150 errors per query per minute.

        Specified by:
        setClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold in interface IClusterInfo
        Parameters:
        errorsCountThreshold - allowed amount of server error per one query per minute.

      • isClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses

        public boolean isClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses()
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Returns whether processes with errors should be force terminated.
        Specified by:
        isClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses in interface IClusterInfo
        Returns:
        whether processes with errors should be force terminated.

      • setClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses

        public void setClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses(boolean killProblemProcesses)
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Enforces termination of processes with errors. If the value is set true, the processes which are recognized to be default according to the monitoring results will be force terminated. Possible reasons on which a processes can be recognized to be default:
        • value exceed IClusterInfo.getClusterRecyclingErrorsCountThreshold(),
        • the amount of memory used by the processor is exceeded
        • process hang-up (stops to respond the queries),
        • the process has not been terminated in a certain time after being excluded from a cluster.
        Specified by:
        setClusterRecyclingKillProblemProcesses in interface IClusterInfo
        Parameters:
        killProblemProcesses - whether processes with errors should be force terminated.

      • isClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump

        public boolean isClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump()
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Returns whether dump should be created for processes exceeded memory limit during termination
        Specified by:
        isClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump in interface IClusterInfo
        Returns:
        whether dump should be created for processes exceeded memory limit during termination

      • setClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump

        public void setClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump(boolean killByMemoryWithDump)
        Description copied from interface: IClusterInfo
        Enforces creation of memory dump of processes, which are killed for exceeding memory limit. If the value is set true, the memory dump is generated while killing the procecces which have exceeded memory limit.
        Specified by:
        setClusterRecyclingKillByMemoryWithDump in interface IClusterInfo
        Parameters:
        killByMemoryWithDump - whether dump should be created for processes exceeded memory limit during termination
